title: ProvenanceRecord

id.description: Stable URN identifying this provenance record (urn:srcos:prov:<id>).

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

activity.description: URN of the activity (RunRecord or WorkflowNode) that generated the lineage.

agent.description: URN of the agent (subject, workload, or service) that performed the activity.

entities.description: List of input and output data entities with their roles and optional content hashes.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this provenance record was created.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over this record for tamper detection.

description: A PROV-compatible lineage record linking a data-processing activity (run or workflow node) to the agent that performed it and the input and output data entities it consumed and produced.
